title: stachys sublobata
intro: Stachys sublobata, also known as Betonique, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Lamiaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Stachys sublobata include relief from digestive issues, menstrual cramps, and respiratory problems, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. Traditionally, Stachys sublobata is prepared as an infusion or a decoction, often used to treat a range of health issues, and is also used in skincare products due to its antiseptic properties.
